extortion.description: [AI generated] Albrecht & Partner Steuerberatung is a German Tax Advisory company headquartered in Frankfurt. With expertise in accounting, auditing, and tax services, the company largely caters to small and medium-sized enterprises, assisting them in tax planning and compliance. They prioritize individual consultations, tailored solutions, and personal service for their clients. The firm prides itself on its competence, commitment, and the continuity of its client relationships.
